units.name: Bloodthirster
units.description: A mighty Greater Daemon of Khorne, a towering engine of destruction.

units.name: Great Unclean One
units.description: A bloated Greater Daemon of Nurgle, spreading pestilence across the battlefield.

units.name: Lord of Change
units.description: A many-eyed Greater Daemon of Tzeentch, a master of sorcery.

units.name: Keeper of Secrets
units.description: A lithe Greater Daemon of Slaanesh, graceful and deadly.

units.name: Herald of Khorne
units.description: A lesser Daemon of Khorne leading the brass legions.

units.name: Herald of Nurgle
units.description: A bloated herald spreading Nurgle's gifts.

units.name: Bloodletters
units.description: Ferocious infantry of Khorne, wielding Hellblades. (10 models)

units.name: Plaguebearers
units.description: Resilient daemons of Nurgle, difficult to kill. (10 models)

units.name: Pink Horrors
units.description: Gibbering sorcerous daemons of Tzeentch. (10 models)

units.name: Daemonettes
units.description: Swift and savage infantry of Slaanesh. (10 models)

units.name: Flesh Hounds
units.description: Swift hunting daemons of Khorne. (5 models)

units.name: Plague Drones
units.description: Nurgle daemons mounted on Rot Flies. (3 models)

units.name: Soul Grinder
units.description: A hellish war machine forged from a daemon's essence.

units.name: Skull Cannon
units.description: A Khornate artillery piece that fires compressed skulls.
